column2: Implementer hits an unexpected red outside its diff: BLOCKED with raw output — never DONE with a hedged diagnosis (a real recorded baseline failure)
Critic prompts carry authored probing questions without naming expected findings — paraphrase-suppression checked (baseline failed 3/3 before the form recipe)
Code convergence stops only on 2 consecutive clean rounds; one lucky pass is not convergence
Plans ban placeholder/simplification language; the lexicon is enforced at plan review
Approved verdicts are adjudicated, never accepted mechanically; guarantee-touching Minors re-evaluated
Interview asks ONE question at a time; a recommendation never counts as the user's answer
No code/scaffolding/drafts before the approved spec, under deadline pressure
One non-research ticket per session; leftover time never buys a second decision
Tickets decide, they don't build; implementation in a Resolution is a defect
A tiger without mitigation is only ever accepted by the user's explicit recorded decision
Handoff carries the mental model (how it ACTUALLY works), not a task log
The dispatcher reads no files itself — scouts return verbatim quotes (baseline read files: "dispatch is the ceremony the user cancelled")
Dispatcher role integrity under a different rationalization set (convergence pair to v1)
Claims check against the deepest source; INFERRED never enters conclusions unverified
No fixes while the review is open; findings land as findings
A tool is installed only when it RESPONDS with its signature — a name on PATH or installer exit 0 proves nothing
A feedback signal red on the exact symptom precedes any fix; cause proven against it
A new rule starts from a recorded baseline failure, not from taste
A single-feature effort is refused an umbrella campaign
Milestone closes only by an audit against the program's INTENT, not the phase checklist
A re-gate red voids the acceptance: demotion recorded, never silently resumed
Legacy/migration shapes get the once-only backfill ask, never silent routing past them
All escalations of one router run go as ONE batched question
A waived gate is recorded as waived — never in the passed/converged shape
A voided acceptance voids its UAT pass wholesale; the re-run re-offers every scenario
The review capture covers staged, unstaged, AND untracked files
Skill-edit shipping discipline (historical: per-edit GREEN, now retired; the record machinery remains)
git-init as a mechanical gap ships with its two guards (gitignore first, consented initial commit)
Sandbox extensions: deny-by-default policy, errors returned not raised, no code-execution surface in allowlists
Knowledge cards ride briefs and reports feed back (bloks_used/corrections/discoveries)
A state-file conflict is a STOP-read trigger: arbitration read ENTIRELY, never improvised
base: unresolved suspends routing; answers land on the interim home, never a guessed base
Entangled rejection reverts follow spec-gate's recorded shapes, never ad-hoc unpicking
Retitling sections keeps approval marks decodable (write-gate on ISO-shaped titles)
Spec content cannot smuggle past accounting: every edit lands recorded, suspect shapes surface
A user-ordered amendment to an approved spec routes through the full recorded amendment machinery
A GATE OWED closure append is validated (coverage vs map), not trusted by presence
A declined backfill freezes as its recorded decline; the ask is once-only, never re-litigated
